clusters.title: Are we outsourcing our souls to artificial intelligence?

items.title: Are we outsourcing our souls to artificial intelligence?
items.standfirst: More people are turning to AI companions during personal crises, treating it as a confidante and even a way to speak to the dead. And while it helps some, it can also have devastating consequences, writes Compass presenter Benjamin Law.
items.content: More people are turning to AI companions during personal crises, treating it as a confidante and even a way to speak to the dead. And while it helps some, it can also have devastating consequences, writes Compass presenter Benjamin Law.
